hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
patterns = ['rm -rf', 'rm -fr', 'drop table', 'git push --force', 'git push -f', 'git push --force-with-lease']
for pat in patterns:
    if pat.lower() in cmd.lower():
        print(json.dumps({'continue': False, 'stopReason': f'[BLOCKED] 위험한 명령어 감지: \"{pat}\" — 실행이 차단되었습니다.'}))
        sys.exit(2)
"
